arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Arsenal early team news hint dropped amid nervy Cole Palmer injury wait
arts.sum: Enzo Fernandez has left a hint that he will be involved in Chelsea's Sunday afternoon crunch match with Arsenal. However, as Maresca faces the possibility of facing Arsenal without Cole Palmer - who is a serious injury doubt - Fernandez is one of the players who could cover for him.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea star 'interested' in Premier League return after trophy admission
arts.sum: Former Chelsea star Fikayo Tomori is being linked with a return to the Premier League three years after leaving Stamford Bridge . The report claims that Tomori would be open to returning to the Premier League if the right club made a suitable offer.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta rolls the dice with major Arsenal changes against Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to Chelsea on Sunday for a crucial game in the race for a top four spot, with Mikel Arteta opting to risk several players who have been carrying injuries

arts.ttl: Chelsea-Arsenal lineups confirmed as Cole Palmer, Declan Rice decisions made
arts.sum: Cole Palmer is passed fit for Chelsea in their Premier League London derby with Arsenal, while Declan Rice, Kai Havertz and Martin Odegaard all start for the Gunners.

arts.ttl: 'Work in progress' - how Maresca is turning Chelsea around
arts.sum: Amid challenges of an oversized Chelsea squad and external criticism, Guillem Balague looks at how new manager Enzo Maresca has turned the club's fortunes around.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Live clockwatch | And email Dominic Chelsea (4-2-3-1): Sánchez; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Lavia, Caicedo; Madueke, Palmer, Neto; Jackson. Subs: Jorgensen, Badiashile, James, Tosin, Veiga, Fernández, Mudryk, J.Félix, Nkunku. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'Chelsea will dominate English football for the next 10 years'
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca believes his side will “dominate English football for the next five to 10 years.” 'Chelsea will dominate English football for the next 10 years' - Maresca

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Arsenal LIVE: Team news and line-ups as Cole Palmer and Martin Odegaard start Premier League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal travel across the capital looking to reignite their title ambitions in a showdown with London rivals Chelsea

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes allegiances clear before Chelsea vs Arsenal clash on Sky Sports
arts.sum: As Arsenal and Chelsea prepare to do battle near the Premier League’s summit, Sky Sports’ Paul Merson has come clean with where his loyalties lie

arts.ttl: I quit Arsenal and am scoring goals for fun - this is how I feel about returning
arts.sum: Upon leaving the Gunners, Biereth reflected on his time at the club: “Of course, I’m sad to have left Arsenal . Biereth is the first-choice striker for a Sturm Graz team that are five points clear at the top of the Bundesliga and embarking on their first Champions League campaign since the 2000/01 season.
